# UHR — Universal Hook Registry

> npm-style dependency resolution for AI coding CLI hooks (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI).
> Applies the npm model to hooks: services declare requirements in a manifest, UHR merges
> declarations, detects conflicts, and generates platform-native configs as build artifacts.

<!-- Generated: 2026-03-02 | Source: src/cli.ts, src/types.ts, src/conflicts.ts -->

## Core Concepts

- **Service Manifest** — JSON file declaring a service's hooks, permissions, and ordering constraints
- **Lockfile** (`.uhr/uhr.lock.json`) — deterministic state of all installed services; source of truth
- **Platform configs** (`.claude/settings.json`, `.cursor/hooks.json`, `.gemini/settings.json`) — generated artifacts, never hand-edited
- **Platforms**: `claude-code`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`
- **Merge modes**: `strict` (UHR owns all hooks), `preserve` (imported hooks coexist), `hybrid`

## CLI Commands

```
uhr init [--platforms <list>]
  Initialize .uhr/ in the current project. Default platform: claude-code.
  --platforms  Comma-separated: claude-code,cursor,gemini-cli

uhr install <manifest> [--force] [--platforms <list>]
  Install a service from a manifest file. Detects conflicts before writing.
  --force      Override conflict errors
  --platforms  Override active platforms for this install (not persisted to lockfile)

uhr uninstall <name>
  Remove a service and regenerate platform configs. Blocked if other services depend on it.

uhr update <name> [--force] [--platforms <list>]
  Re-install a service from its original local: source path.

uhr list
  List installed services with versions and hook counts.

uhr check <manifest>
  Dry-run conflict check. Exit 0 = no errors. Exit 1 = conflicts found.

uhr diff <manifest>
  Show hooks added/removed/changed vs. currently installed version.

uhr rebuild [--platforms <list>]
  Regenerate all platform configs from lockfile.
  --platforms  Filter which platform configs to write (ephemeral, does not change lockfile).

uhr doctor [--json]
  Diagnose issues: missing configs, stale generated files, integrity mismatches,
  services with no hooks for active platforms, import/merge risks.
  Exit 0 = no errors, Exit 1 = errors found.

uhr restore [timestamp]
  Without timestamp: list available backups.
  With timestamp: restore platform configs from that backup.

uhr import [--platforms <list>] [--json]
  Scan existing platform configs and report importable hooks. Read-only (no changes).

uhr migrate [--mode preserve] [--dry-run] [--yes] [--platforms <list>]
  Import existing platform hooks into UHR management.
  --mode       strict | preserve | hybrid (default: preserve)
  --dry-run    Preview without writing
  --yes        Apply the migration
```

## Manifest Schema

```json
{
  "name": "my-service",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Optional description",
  "hooks": [
    {
      "id": "unique-hook-id",
      "on": "sessionStart",
      "command": "echo hello",
      "tools": ["Bash", "Read"],
      "blocking": false,
      "timeout": 5000,
      "background": false,
      "platforms": ["claude-code"]
    }
  ],
  "permissions": {
    "allow": ["Bash(git *)"],
    "deny": ["Bash(rm -rf *)"]
  },
  "ordering": {
    "other-service": { "runAfter": ["other-service"] }
  },
  "requires": ["other-service"],
  "conflicts": ["incompatible-service"]
}
```

## Hook Events (UniversalEvent)

| Event | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `sessionStart` | AI session begins |
| `sessionEnd` | AI session ends |
| `beforeToolExecution` | Before any tool call |
| `afterToolExecution` | After any tool call |
| `beforePromptSubmit` | Before user prompt sent |
| `afterModelResponse` | After model response received |
| `beforeFileRead` | Before reading a file |
| `beforeMcpExecution` | Before MCP tool call |
| `permissionRequest` | When tool permission requested |
| `notification` | Notification event |
| `stop` | Agent stop |
| `subagentStop` | Subagent stop |
| `beforeCompact` | Before context compaction |
| `beforeToolSelection` | Before tool selection |

## Conflict Types

| Type | Severity | Trigger |
|------|----------|---------|
| `explicit` | error | `conflicts` field declares incompatibility |
| `missing_requirement` | error | `requires` dependency not installed |
| `permission_contradiction` | error | One service allows what another denies |
| `duplicate_hook` | warning | Identical hook (event+tools+command) already installed |
| `shared_slot` | warning | Same event+tools slot, different command |
| `circular_ordering` | error | Cycle in `ordering` constraints |
| `platform_gap` | warning | Hook targets a platform not in lockfile platforms |
| `ownership_collision` | warning | UHR-managed hook conflicts with imported hook |

## Key Types

```typescript
type PlatformId = "claude-code" | "cursor" | "gemini-cli";
type MergeMode = "strict" | "preserve" | "hybrid";
type HookOwnership = "uhr-managed" | "imported" | "external";

interface UhrLockfile {
  lockfileVersion: 2;
  generatedAt: string;
  platforms: PlatformId[];
  installed: Record<string, InstalledService>;
  resolvedOrder: Record<string, string[]>;
  mergeMode: MergeMode;
}
```

## Pipeline

```
Service Manifest → Resolver (topological sort) → Conflict Detector → Lockfile → Platform Adapters → Generated Configs
```

## Quick Start for Agents

```bash
# Initialize project (claude-code only)
uhr init

# Initialize with multiple platforms
uhr init --platforms claude-code,cursor,gemini-cli

# Install a service
uhr install ./my-service.json

# Check for problems
uhr doctor

# Migrate existing hooks into UHR
uhr migrate --mode preserve --yes

# Regenerate configs after manual lockfile changes
uhr rebuild
```
